tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def issues (linear__list_issues {:state "in_progress"} ))

(def grouped-by-assignee (group-by :assignee issues))

(def counts (map (fn [[assignee issues]] [assignee (count issues)]) grouped-by-assignee))

(def sorted-by-count (sort-by second > counts))

(first sorted-by-count)"}
